quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with controlled source evolution, equivalent Spear and Bow execution evidence, recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Gate 5 equivalent local Bow proof is intentionally paused by Jayson. No Gate 5 Preview, Build, Execute, package, workflow, branch, or pull request is authorized.
completed_durable_work: Gate 4 GitHub-native Build proof is merged at Prime main 0c5c1c4887638efd61e8df701c58446047465f6d.
Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
The post-Solar-Eclipse Codex source alignment and Strikeforce doctrine are merged at Codex main c3e664d429d553a41975f9df47ba946dbe402550.
The universal Bow/Arrow contract uses one Build Arrow, Strikeforce, one Execute Arrow, Strikeforce, a compact Emberline, and a recommended next-move Decision Box.
Internal checkpoints are machine-only and never separate user fires.
chat_only_or_uncertain: The V6 alignment mission is complete only after the exact final Execute receipt and generated final-tree readback pass.
The Quest completion range remains broad pending Gates 5-8, recovery proof, migration waves, rollback, and explicit cutover.
remaining_work: Keep Gate 5 paused until Jayson explicitly resumes it.
When resumed, prove equivalent local Bow execution under the universal Arrow-level contract.
Prove Artemis read-only validation without execution authority in Gate 6.
Prove linked multi-repository, partial-state, and recovery behavior in Gate 7.
Resume C07 read-only semantic reconciliation and bounded migration only in Gate 8.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before any authority change.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, network, device, infrastructure, or secret evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: While Gate 5 remains paused, use the final post-Execute Decision Box to continue substantive Atlas work, review the canonical Active Workboard, Sunset, Solar Eclipse, Phoenix Flare, or hold.
emberline.next_approval_gate: A later explicit Jayson instruction is required before any Gate 5 Preview or execution artifact.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not activate persistent S1 or Artemis.
Do not begin Gate 5-8 execution without the applicable explicit gates.
Do not migrate C07 content, move or delete Drive material, promote Prime, retire Codex, delete evidence, claim Phoenix Reborn, or cut over.
Do not treat this SHADOW Quest Board as canonical or as execution authority.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 remains deferred to Gate 8 after Gates 5-7 capability and recovery proof.
blockers: Gate 5 is paused; Gates 5-7 must close before Gate 8 migration work.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: GitHub is the durable clean-text source. Drive remains protected reference, archive, collaboration, application, and exception space. No Drive mutation is authorized.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Continue only separately routed read-only dependency reconciliation.

campaigns.title: Athena's Spear and Artemis's Bow and Arrow
campaigns.current_gate: Gates 1-4 complete; Gate 5 paused. Universal Arrow-level operator contract prepared for durable alignment.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Do not prepare Gate 5. Use the post-Execute Decision Box to choose substantive Atlas work or continuity routing.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: Prime Quest Board remains SHADOW and synchronized to canonical Codex continuity without becoming an independent Workboard.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Keep authority SHADOW until cutover and rollback are separately proven and approved.

completion_range.basis: Gates 1-4 and post-Solar-Eclipse source alignment are complete; Gate 5 remains paused and Gates 5-8, recovery, migration, rollback, and cutover remain.

quests.next_safe_action: Use the final post-Execute Decision Box rather than automatically entering another maintenance protocol.
quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson instruction to resume Gate 5, or a separate approved substantive Atlas route.
